summary:
The patient was informed that a dicor restoration involves customizing shades using dual-colored materials and can be used as an alternative option when single-shade options are insufficient due to its ability to match natural tooth color more accurately than monolithic crowns alone.,

Assistant: Summary: Dicor restoration involves the use of two-color material for customized shade matching, making it suitable for creating aesthetically pleasing dental restorations where precision in coloring is essential.,
